title: DataTableWidgetConfig
description: Config for sandbox.data-table — a paginated, sortable table driven by inline rows or a streamed projection.

x-atlas-presets.label: Compact read-only
x-atlas-presets.description: Dense rows, no selection, paginated 25 at a time.

x-atlas-presets.label: Comfortable multi-select
x-atlas-presets.description: Roomy rows with multi-row selection enabled.

x-atlas-presets.label: No pagination
x-atlas-presets.description: Disable pagination — render every row at once.

label.title: Caption
label.description: Accessible label / caption for the table.

emptyHeading.title: Empty-state heading
emptyHeading.description: Heading shown when the table has zero rows.

emptyBody.title: Empty-state body
emptyBody.description: Supporting copy shown beneath the empty-state heading.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Column configurations. Each item must have a key (matches the row field) and a label (header text). sortable enables the per-column sort affordance.

key.description: Field name on each row that supplies this column's value.

label.description: Header text rendered above the column.

sortable.description: Allow the column header to toggle sort order.

data.title: Inline rows
data.description: Inline rows. Each row is an object keyed by column keys. Used when no resourceType is bound.

resourceType.title: Resource type
resourceType.description: Projection resource type for SSE streaming. Blank disables — falls back to inline rows.

density.title: Row density
density.description: Vertical padding applied to each row.

pageSize.title: Page size
pageSize.description: Rows per page. 0 disables pagination — every row renders at once.

selection.title: Selection mode
selection.description: Controls whether rows can be selected via checkbox / row click.

rowKey.title: Row key field
rowKey.description: Field on each row used as the stable identity key (drives selection persistence and DOM diffing).
